headline: Decision Making
description: Effective decision-making balances intuition with analysis. Key frameworks: pros/cons list, decision matrix (weighted criteria), cost-benefit analysis, expected value, premortem (imagine failure, then work backwards). Avoid: analysis paralysis, sunk cost fallacy, confirmation bias. 'Good decision process > good outcome' — you can do everything right and still lose.

citation.name: Decisive: How to Make Better Choices (2025)
citation.author: Heath C., Heath D.

citation.name: Thinking, Fast and Slow (2025 Anniversary Edition)
citation.author: Kahneman D.
